descriptionShort: Humboldt Broncos defeat Richmond Sockeyes 5-3 in Game 1 of Abbott Cup series; Curtis Chamberlin scores three goals including two in overtime.
descriptionLong: Curtis Chamberlin scored three goals, including twice in a 10-minute overtime period, to lead the Humboldt Broncos to a 5-3 victory over the Richmond Sockeyes in the opening game of the best-of-seven Abbott Cup series at Humboldt Uniplex on Monday, April 21, 1987. The Broncos' 17th consecutive playoff win featured Chamberlin's go-ahead goal with 1:39 remaining in overtime on a two-on-one pass from Joey Johannson.

attribution.headline: Chamberlin arrives in time for Broncos
